name: 寬限期
description: World is stable. Peace agreements hold. Corporate ethics still apply. Players can move freely across zones.

name: 起源
description: The Void begins to affect the world. Regional tensions rise. Zone crossing is restricted to those with lord permits. Utopia forces become visible.

name: 進展
description: Anomalies appear. Interpersonal conflicts escalate. Faction alignment becomes critical. Some areas open; others are sealed.

name: 加劇
description: Major disasters and anomalies erupt. Reality-distorting extreme events in varied forms. Title Bearers activate. Utopia personnel appear extensively.

name: 終局
description: The Void fully manifests. Atmospheric dark matter surges. Some areas are eroded. Dark matter entities appear rarely but are extremely dangerous. Human society collapses into infighting.
